title: Open-Source API for Asynchronous Tasks Using Agents
abstract:
My ops team had a problem. They manage logistics deliveries in different countries with different carriers. We didn't want to do API integrations with carriers because each country has a different carrier. We thought of considering it for a later stage.

Team was spending time daily monitoring
abstract_zh: 我团队天天忙活，物流监控操碎了心。每个国家用的快递都不一样，API对接简直比搞定异地恋还复杂。于是我们决定先不管它，专心搞业务。后来发现，不如让“agents”来跑腿吧！有了这个开源API，任务异步处理，监控再也不用日复一日地盯着屏幕了。解放双手，让我们一起享受科技带来的轻松吧！
